tasks.subject: Task 1: Fix _build_query search routing for quoted field:value
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Route quoted field:value search terms to match_phrase instead of query_string

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/app/es_client.py:349-366`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `error_reason:'Exception("Erreur: OSError")'` uses match_phrase
- [ ] Unquoted `service_name:my-service` still uses query_string
- [ ] General search terms still get wildcard wrapping

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/dlq-manager-service/backend/app/es_client.py"], "verifyCommand": "curl test against running backend", "acceptanceCriteria": ["quoted field:value uses match_phrase", "unquoted field:value uses query_string", "general terms get wildcard wrapping"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add error_reason filter, services endpoint, and rule timestamps
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three backend additions: error_reason filter, POST /api/services endpoint, rule timing fields

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/app/es_client.py`, `backend/app/api.py`, `backend/app/models.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] _build_query handles filters.error_reason as match_phrase
- [ ] POST /api/services returns service names respecting current filters
- [ ] Rules index has last_evaluated_at and last_archived_at fields
- [ ] apply_auto_archive_rule updates timestamps appropriately

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/dlq-manager-service/backend/app/es_client.py", "apps-microservices/dlq-manager-service/backend/app/api.py", "apps-microservices/dlq-manager-service/backend/app/models.py"], "verifyCommand": "curl POST /api/services", "acceptanceCriteria": ["error_reason filter works", "services endpoint returns filtered results", "rule timestamps update correctly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Frontend API types — apiGetServiceNames + rule timestamps
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add apiGetServiceNames function and update AutoArchiveRule interface

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/lib/api.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] apiGetServiceNames calls POST /api/services
- [ ] AutoArchiveRule includes last_evaluated_at and last_archived_at

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/dlq-manager-service/frontend/lib/api.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build in frontend/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["apiGetServiceNames exists", "AutoArchiveRule has timestamp fields"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Hide archive buttons on archived-only views
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Conditionally hide archive buttons when status filter is exclusively archived statuses

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/components/dlq/SearchPage.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Status ["Archived"] hides archive buttons
- [ ] Status ["Auto-Archived"] hides archive buttons
- [ ] Status ["New", "Archived"] keeps archive buttons visible
- [ ] Empty status keeps archive buttons visible

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/dlq-manager-service/frontend/components/dlq/SearchPage.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "visual browser check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["archive buttons hidden for archived-only", "buttons visible for mixed statuses"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Dynamic service name list based on current filters
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace one-time service name fetch with dynamic re-fetch on status/date filter changes

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/components/dlq/SearchPage.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Service list updates when status filter changes
- [ ] Service list updates when date filters change
- [ ] No circular dependency
- [ ] Debounced at 300ms

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/dlq-manager-service/frontend/components/dlq/SearchPage.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "visual browser check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dynamic re-fetch on status change", "debounced", "no circular dependency"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Clickable error filter from Unique Errors modal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make Unique Errors modal rows clickable, add error_reason filter with clearable chip

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/components/dlq/SearchPage.tsx`, `frontend/components/dlq/UniqueErrorsModal.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Clicking error row sets error_reason filter and closes modal
- [ ] Clearable chip shows active error filter
- [ ] error_reason sent to backend in filters payload

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/dlq-manager-service/frontend/components/dlq/SearchPage.tsx", "apps-microservices/dlq-manager-service/frontend/components/dlq/UniqueErrorsModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "visual browser check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["clickable rows", "clearable chip", "filter sent to backend"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: View Matches button + rule timestamp columns on Rules page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add View Matches eye icon and Last Checked/Last Archived columns to rules table

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/components/dlq/RulesPage.tsx`, `frontend/components/dlq/SearchPage.tsx`, `frontend/app/page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] View Matches navigates to Search with rule criteria
- [ ] Timestamp columns display correctly
- [ ] Relative time formatting with >24h absolute fallback

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/dlq-manager-service/frontend/components/dlq/RulesPage.tsx", "apps-microservices/dlq-manager-service/frontend/components/dlq/SearchPage.tsx", "apps-microservices/dlq-manager-service/frontend/app/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "visual browser check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["View Matches navigates correctly", "timestamp columns display", "relative time formatting"]}
```
